summary: Iteration 94 testing complete. Claret AI + Knowledge Base module fully tested. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working correctly.

issues: Page shows loading animation for extended time (~8-10 seconds) on /welcome route before redirecting to home. This is a UX concern but not blocking.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 94 Claret AI + Knowledge Base module fully tested. Key verifications: 1) Knowledge Base page loads at /knowledge-base with upload button, category filters (SOPs, Policies, Training Materials, Training Videos, General), and search. 2) KB upload works via multipart/form-data with file, category, title, description fields. 3) KB download endpoint works. 4) Claret AI chat widget appears as floating button (bottom-right) on all pages with data-testid='claret-toggle-btn'. 5) Clicking Claret button opens chat panel with welcome message. 6) Sending a message to Claret gets a response from Claude AI with mood scores (energy, stress, motivation, happiness, overall). 7) Claret chat responses include Listen (TTS) and ML (Malayalam translation) buttons. 8) Chat history is stored and persists across sessions. 9) Claret Dashboard loads at /claret with mood scores and theme picker (6 color presets). 10) CEO can see Team Overview and Analytics tabs on Claret Dashboard. 11) Organization Map loads at /organization with department hierarchy, CEO card, and drag handles for admin users. 12) Home page shows Knowledge Base and Claret Dashboard quick access buttons at bottom.

knowledge_base_page.details: KB page loads at /knowledge-base with upload button, search, category filters (All, SOPs, Policies, Training Materials, Training Videos, General)

kb_upload.details: Upload form shows file input, category dropdown, title input, description input. Backend accepts multipart/form-data

claret_floating_button.details: Floating button with sparkle icon appears in bottom-right corner on all pages

claret_chat_panel.details: Chat panel opens with header 'Claret - Your AI buddy at CLT', shows mood indicator, has input field and send button

claret_ai_response.details: Claude Sonnet 4.5 responds with personality, humor, and mood scores. Response includes message, mood_scores, suggested_actions

claret_tts_ml_buttons.details: Each assistant message has 'Listen' (TTS) and 'ML' (Malayalam translation) buttons

claret_chat_history.details: Chat history persists across page refreshes. GET /api/claret/chat/history returns previous messages

claret_dashboard.details: Dashboard at /claret shows mood scores (Energy, Stress, Motivation, Happiness, Overall), Mood Journey calendar, theme picker

claret_theme_picker.details: 6 color presets available: Indigo Vibes, Ocean Breeze, Sunset Glow, Forest Calm, Berry Burst, Midnight

claret_ceo_tabs.details: CEO sees My Wellness, Team Overview, and Analytics tabs. Team Overview shows all users' moods. Analytics shows avg mood, distribution, daily trend

mood_api_endpoints.details: POST /api/claret/chat returns mood_scores. GET /api/claret/mood/my-scores, team-overview, analytics all working

organization_map.details: Org map at /organization shows 54 employees across 8 departments. CEO card, department sections, team blocks all visible

org_map_drag_handles.details: Drag handles (grip icons) visible on person cards for admin users

home_page_quick_access.details: Home page shows 'Knowledge Base' and 'Claret Dashboard' quick access buttons at bottom with correct links
